Executive Summary
The CARS24 chatbot handled 6795 sessions (2699 DSQ · 4096 QNR) and is performing positively, converting 41% of interactions into new auctions. Resolution quality is developing at 45.3% among dropped sessions, and the 7.9% repeat-message bug warrants attention. 8.4% of sessions triggered both an auction and a ticket.
